caption: A screen capture displays a video conferencing call and a digital mind map. A man with a headset, wearing a dark shirt, is visible in a small video window at the top right of the screen. The main area shows a complex network of interconnected nodes with lines and text on a black background. Legible labels on the nodes include "Imagination," "Deep Learning," "Insight," and "Intuitive Thinking." Several icons, including an image of a brain and various abstract symbols, are distributed throughout the map. At the top of the browser window, several tabs are open, with text such as "Trust & Learning by Systemantics," "Future of Society by Systemantics," and "Insights Introduction | Kumu." A side panel on the right contains a list of participants, including "Kevin Bedding." Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static, with no significant changes in the layout or the man's position.
